title: Pretband Help Ons Bloaz'n (Brummen) | Party Brass Band
description: The Pretband from Brummen: the ultimate party brass band (dweilorkest) for chaos, party vibes, and pure fun. Book us for festivals, events, and street parties.

hero.tagline: THE BEST INVENTION SINCE SLICED BREAD!
hero.narrative: We are <italic>NOT</italic> a normal orchestra. We are <wavy>PLEASANTLY INSANE</wavy>, a <plain>PARTY</plain> and a lot of <noise>NOISE</noise>

about.description: Pretband Help Ons Bloaz'n - Festive musicians from Brummen. A pleasantly-insane group of musicians from Brummen, a beautiful village between Amsterdam and Berlin. Luckily we have various means of transport at our disposal so we can perform anywhere, from indoors to outdoors! So besides activities in Brummen, you can also find us at various street festivals or other festivities.
about.feat_1_desc: From street festivals to events, anywhere and everywhere!
about.feat_2_desc: Our team of vibe makers is ready to bring the house down!

highlights.title: WHAT WE DO
highlights.description: For any party, event or festival. Whether it's a village party, street festival, parade, opening, company party or neighborhood festival: we throw a party everywhere. Our music style is energetic, cheerful and always focused on the audience. We provide movement, atmosphere and above all, a lot of fun. With colorful outfits, an infectious energy and a good dose of Brummen down-to-earthness, we breathe new life into every event. 🎷

gallery.title: CHAOS CAPTURED
gallery.description: A glimpse into our most chaotic, musical, and above all, fun moments. This is what pure joy looks like!

agenda.badge: Check where we're tearing things down!

contact.description: Tell us where and when you want to throw a party — we will provide the music, atmosphere and the necessary fun. Feel free to send a message! Our team of vibe makers is ready for you.

form.message_placeholder: Tell us what you're planning (date, location, vibe)...
form.success: Message sent. We'll get back to you soon!
